sections.label: Verse 1
lines: The night keeps asking questions
I don’t know how to answer yet
Every step feels like a sentence
Every breath a heavy bet
I didn’t ask for the shaking
Didn’t choose this broken road
But something in the silence
Says I’m not here on my own

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: If the storm is still speaking
Maybe I should listen close
If the weight is still teaching
There’s a strength I haven’t known

sections.label: Chorus
lines: So I’ll count it joy when it hurts like hell
When the fire’s proof I’m alive, not failed
Every tear is shaping me
Every scar’s a victory
I’ll count it joy in the trial phase
When I’m bending but I don’t break
If it’s building something whole in me
Let it finish what it’s making me

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Patience feels like dying slowly
Like waiting on the sun to rise
But faith is learning how to breathe
When the answers don’t arrive
I’m not running from the tension
I’m not cutting through the pain
If the cracks are where the light gets in
Then I’ll stand here in the rain

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: I won’t rush the becoming
I won’t curse the in-between
What if this is how I’m learning
What it really means to be free

sections.label: Chorus
lines: So I’ll count it joy when it hurts like hell
When the fire’s proof I’m alive, not failed
Every tear is shaping me
Every scar’s a victory
I’ll count it joy in the trial phase
When I’m bending but I don’t break
If it’s building something whole in me
Let it finish what it’s making me

sections.label: Bridge
lines: If I’m unfinished, don’t let me quit
If I’m breaking, make meaning of it
I don’t need easy, I need complete
I don’t need fast, I need real in me
Through the pressure… I’m becoming
Through the pain… I’m still standing

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: So I’ll count it joy—yeah, I’ll still believe
What’s testing me is strengthening
When the process is done in me
I’ll be whole… I’ll be free
